india_trends.title: EPFO may raise minimum pension under EPS-95; settles 83.1 million claims in 2025-26
india_trends.summary: Labour and employment minister Mansukh Mandaviya, Wednesday, said that the Employees’ Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) settled 6.103 million claims in April 2026, with nearly 74% of PF advance claims processed in auto mode and 98.70% of total claims settled in less than 20 days, on the back of EPF

india_trends.title: Bajaj Finance Q4 Results: Net profit rises 22% YoY to ₹5,465 crore, NII grows 20%; declares ₹6 final dividend
india_trends.summary: Bajaj Finance reported a 22% increase in consolidated net profit to ₹5,465 crore for Q4 FY26, slightly below estimates. Net profit rose 37.38% sequentially from the December quarter, while net interest income increased 20% year-over-year to ₹11,781 crore.

SWAMIH fund infuses Rs 600 crore with Ramky group to revive stuck projects in Bengaluru
india_trends.summary: In a significant boost for the housing sector, the SWAMIH Investment Fund will invest as much as Rs 600 crore into Ramky Estates, focusing on resurrecting halted residential projects in Bengaluru. This investment will directly benefit more than 1,800 homebuyers who have been waiting for their homes.

india_trends.title: Prestige Group bets on rental-led senior living, eyes premium play in Bengaluru
india_trends.summary: Prestige Group is planning a hospitality-style model instead of apartment sales as it taps a fast-growing but underpenetrated segment.

india_trends.summary: Bajaj Finance Q4 results: The NBFC's Board has also recommended a final dividend of Rs 6 per share for the financial year ended March 2026.

india_trends.title: MakeMyTrip considers India listing amid strategy to tap domestic investors
india_trends.summary: The Nasdaq-listed travel platform has reportedly engaged Axis Capital, Morgan Stanley and JPMorgan Chase as advisers, with plans to add more banks.

india_trends.title: Adani Green, Adani Power among 7 largecaps that hit 52-week high; stocks rally up to 50% in a month
india_trends.summary: Seven BSE largecap stocks—including Adani Green, Adani Power and Nestle India—hit fresh 52-week highs as the market rally lifted gains up to 50% in a month.

india_trends.title: Crude oil price jumps to $115, highest level since June 2022 amid stalled Iran war talks. Brace for $150?
india_trends.summary: Crude oil prices surged to near $115 per barrel, the highest since June 2022, driven by escalating Iran conflict tensions and supply risks. Analysts warn that prolonged disruptions and stalled negotiations could push prices towards $150, with the Strait of Hormuz remaining a key flashpoint for globa

india_trends.title: Petrol, diesel price hike? Government denies viral claim, terms it as fake
india_trends.summary: Government has denied reports of increased petrol and diesel prices. A viral social media post claiming price hikes is fake. india_trends.summary: EPACK Durable Limited has launched infrared cooktops, expanding its electric cooking range.
